meta.description: Complete reference of all built-in functions. Intended for code editor autocomplete, linting, and documentation generation.

categories.label: Discord
categories.description: User, server, channel, and bot info

categories.label: Message
categories.description: Send, reply, delete, and parse command input

categories.label: Moderation
categories.description: Ban, kick, timeout, purge

categories.label: Roles
categories.description: Manage and query guild roles

categories.label: Channels
categories.description: Create, delete, and configure channels

categories.label: Variables
categories.description: Session and scoped in-memory key-value stores

categories.label: Database
categories.description: Persistent on-disk key-value storage

categories.label: Control Flow
categories.description: Conditionals, loops, guards, and execution control

categories.label: Logic
categories.description: Boolean and comparison operations

categories.label: Math
categories.description: Arithmetic, rounding, and numeric operations

categories.label: Strings
categories.description: Text transformation and inspection

categories.label: Embeds
categories.description: Build and send Discord rich embeds

categories.label: Components
categories.description: Buttons, select menus, modals, and text inputs

categories.label: Time
categories.description: Current date and time values

categories.label: Cooldown
categories.description: Per-user, global, and server cooldowns

categories.label: Reactions
categories.description: Add, get, and manage message reactions

categories.label: Emojis
categories.description: Create, remove, and inspect custom emojis

categories.label: Random
categories.description: Random picks, strings, users, and channels

categories.label: Miscellaneous
categories.description: Eval, JSON, raw, escape, comment, and utility functions

categories.label: HTTP
categories.description: HTTP GET/POST/PUT/DELETE requests using built-in fetch

categories.label: Webhooks
categories.description: Create, delete, and send messages via Discord webhooks

categories.label: Threads
categories.description: Create, archive, and lock Discord thread channels

categories.label: Permissions
categories.description: Check user and bot Discord permissions

categories.label: Error Handling
categories.description: Try/catch, throw, and suppress errors in scripts

categories.label: Blacklist
categories.description: Per-guild user blacklisting backed by persistent storage

categories.label: Voice Channels
categories.description: Server-mute, deafen, kick, move, and inspect voice channel members

categories.label: Giveaways
categories.description: Full giveaway lifecycle: create, end, reroll, list, and inspect

categories.label: Invites
categories.description: Create, delete, and inspect server invites

categories.label: Scheduled Events
categories.description: Create, delete, and list Discord scheduled events

categories.label: JSON
categories.description: Stateful JSON context: parse, navigate, mutate, and stringify JSON objects

categories.label: AI
categories.description: OpenAI-powered functions: chat, agents, classifiers. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY

categories.label: Slash Commands
categories.description: Register, unregister, and inspect Discord slash commands

categories.label: Tickets
categories.description: Create, close, and detect support ticket channels

functions.name: $username
functions.description: Returns the username of the message author.

functions.name: $userID
functions.description: Returns the Discord user ID of the message author.

functions.name: $authorID
functions.description: Alias for $userID — returns the author's user ID.

functions.name: $userTag
functions.description: Returns the author's display name or legacy tag (User#1234).

functions.name: $userMention
functions.description: Returns a Discord mention string for a user. Defaults to the author.

args.name: userID
args.description: User to mention. Defaults to the message author.

functions.name: $userAvatar
functions.description: Returns the avatar URL of a user. Defaults to the author.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID to look up. Defaults to the message author.

functions.name: $userBanner
functions.description: Returns the banner URL of a user. Empty string if no banner.

functions.name: $userCreated
functions.description: Returns the ISO date the Discord account was created.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to the author.

functions.name: $userJoined
functions.description: Returns the ISO date the user joined the current guild.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to the author.

functions.name: $userRoles
functions.description: Returns a comma-separated list of role IDs the user has in the guild.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to the author.

args.name: separator
args.description: Separator between role IDs. Defaults to ,

functions.name: $displayName
functions.description: Returns the guild display name (nickname or username).

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to the author.

functions.name: $isBot
functions.description: Returns 'true' if the user is a bot account, otherwise 'false'.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to the author.

functions.name: $avatar
functions.description: Returns the avatar URL of a user. Alias for $userAvatar.

args.name: userID
args.description: User ID. Defaults to the message author.

functions.name: $mentioned
functions.description: Returns the user ID of the Nth mention in the message.

args.name: fallbackToAuthor
args.description: If true, returns the author's ID when no mention is found.

functions.name: $guildID
functions.description: Returns the ID of the current guild.

functions.name: $guildName
functions.description: Returns the name of the current guild.

functions.name: $serverID
functions.description: Alias for $guildID.

functions.name: $serverName
functions.description: Alias for $guildName.

functions.name: $serverIcon
functions.description: Returns the server icon URL. Empty string if the server has no icon.

functions.name: $serverBanner
functions.description: Returns the server banner URL. Empty string if none.

functions.name: $serverOwnerID
functions.description: Returns the user ID of the guild owner.

functions.name: $serverCreated
functions.description: Returns the ISO date the guild was created.

functions.name: $serverBoostCount
functions.description: Returns the number of Nitro boosts the server has.

functions.name: $serverBoostLevel
functions.description: Returns the server boost tier (0–3).

functions.name: $serverVanity
functions.description: Returns the vanity invite code. Empty string if none.

functions.name: $serverVerificationLevel
functions.description: Returns the verification level of the server (0 = None, 4 = Highest).

functions.name: $memberCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of members in the guild.

functions.name: $humanCount
functions.description: Returns the number of non-bot members (force-fetches member list).

functions.name: $botCount
functions.description: Returns the number of bot members (force-fetches member list).

functions.name: $roleCount
functions.description: Returns the number of roles in the guild (includes @everyone).

functions.name: $emojiCount
functions.description: Returns the number of custom emojis in the guild.

functions.name: $allMemberIDs
functions.description: Returns all guild member IDs joined by a separator. Force-fetches — requires GuildMembers intent.

args.name: separator
args.description: String to join IDs with. Defaults to ,

functions.name: $channelID
functions.description: Returns the ID of the current channel.

functions.name: $channelName
functions.description: Returns the name of the current channel.

functions.name: $channelTopic
functions.description: Returns the topic of the current channel. Empty if no topic is set.

functions.name: $ping
functions.description: Returns the bot's WebSocket latency in milliseconds.

functions.name: $botID
functions.description: Returns the bot's Discord user ID.

functions.name: $botUsername
functions.description: Returns the bot's username.

functions.name: $botAvatar
functions.description: Returns the bot's avatar URL.

functions.name: $sendMessage
functions.description: Sends a message to the current channel or a specified channel.

args.name: channelID
args.description: Target channel. Defaults to the current channel.

functions.name: $reply
functions.description: Replies to the triggering message.

functions.name: $deleteMessage
functions.description: Deletes the triggering message. Optionally after a delay in milliseconds.

args.name: delayMs
args.description: Delay in ms before deletion (max 60000). Defaults to 0.

functions.name: $channelSendMessage
functions.description: Send a message to any channel by ID.

functions.name: $message
functions.description: Returns the full command input, or the nth word if an index is given (1-based).

args.name: n
args.description: Word index (1-based). No arg = full input.

functions.name: $noMentionMessage
functions.description: Command input with all Discord mentions stripped.

args.name: n
args.description: Word index (1-based). No arg = full stripped input.

functions.name: $argsCount
functions.description: Returns the number of space-separated words in the command input.

functions.name: $arg
functions.description: Returns the Nth word of command input. Alias for $message[n].

functions.name: $commandName
functions.description: Returns the triggered command name without the prefix.

functions.name: $ban
functions.description: Bans a user from the guild. Requires Ban Members permission.

args.name: userID
args.description: ID of the user to ban.

functions.name: $kick
functions.description: Kicks a member from the guild. Requires Kick Members permission.

args.name: userID
args.description: ID of the member to kick.

functions.name: $timeout
functions.description: Times out (mutes) a member for a given duration. Requires Moderate Members permission.

args.name: userID
args.description: ID of the member to time out.

functions.name: $untimeout
functions.description: Removes a timeout from a member.

args.name: userID
args.description: ID of the member to un-mute.

functions.name: $purge
functions.description: Bulk-deletes messages in the current channel (max 100, messages < 14 days old). Returns the number deleted.

functions.name: $hasRole
functions.description: Returns 'true' if the user has the specified role, otherwise 'false'.

functions.name: $addRole
functions.description: Adds a role to a guild member. Requires Manage Roles permission.

functions.name: $removeRole
functions.description: Removes a role from a guild member. Requires Manage Roles permission.

functions.name: $createRole
functions.description: Creates a new role in the guild. Returns the new role ID.

args.name: hoist
args.description: Show role separately in member list.

functions.name: $deleteRole
functions.description: Deletes a role from the guild. Requires Manage Roles permission.

functions.name: $createChannel
functions.description: Creates a channel in the guild. Returns the new channel ID. type: text|voice|category|stage|forum|announcement

functions.name: $deleteChannel
functions.description: Deletes a channel by ID. Requires Manage Channels permission.

functions.name: $setChannelName
functions.description: Renames a channel. Requires Manage Channels permission.

functions.name: $slowmode
functions.description: Sets the slowmode rate limit on a channel. Pass 0 to disable.

functions.name: $var
functions.description: Sets a session variable. Resets each command run.

functions.name: $setVar
functions.description: Explicit alias for $var — sets a session variable.

functions.name: $getVar
functions.description: Retrieves a session variable. Returns the default if not set.

args.name: default
args.description: Fallback value. Defaults to empty string.

functions.name: $deleteVar
functions.description: Removes a session variable.

functions.name: $varExists
functions.description: Returns 'true' if the session variable is set, otherwise 'false'.

functions.name: $listVar
functions.description: Returns all current session variable names joined by a separator.

functions.name: $setUserVar
functions.description: Set a persistent (in-memory) variable scoped to a user. Resets on bot restart.

args.name: userID
args.description: Target user. Defaults to message author.

functions.name: $getUserVar
functions.description: Get a user-scoped variable.

functions.name: $resetUserVar
functions.description: Delete a user-scoped variable.

functions.name: $setServerVar
functions.description: Set a persistent (in-memory) variable scoped to a guild.

functions.name: $getServerVar
functions.description: Get a guild-scoped variable.

functions.name: $resetServerVar
functions.description: Delete a guild-scoped variable.

functions.name: $setChannelVar
functions.description: Set a persistent (in-memory) variable scoped to a channel.

functions.name: $getChannelVar
functions.description: Get a channel-scoped variable.

functions.name: $resetChannelVar
functions.description: Delete a channel-scoped variable.

functions.name: $db.set
functions.description: Persist a value to disk under a key. Survives bot restarts.

functions.name: $db.get
functions.description: Read a persisted value. Returns the default if the key is missing.

args.name: default
args.description: Fallback value. Defaults to empty string.

functions.name: $db.delete
functions.description: Remove a key from persistent storage.

functions.name: $db.has
functions.description: Returns 'true' if the key exists in persistent storage, otherwise 'false'.

functions.name: $if
functions.description: Evaluates a condition and lazily executes the matching branch. Supports: == != > < >= <=

args.name: thenCode
args.description: Executed only when condition is true.

args.name: elseCode
args.description: Executed only when condition is false.

functions.name: $elseif
functions.description: Chained condition for block-style $if. Must follow a $if or $elseif block.

functions.name: $else
functions.description: Fallback branch for block-style $if. Executes when no prior branch matched.

functions.name: $endif
functions.description: Closes a block-style $if/$elseif/$else block.

functions.name: $onlyIf
functions.description: Halts execution if the condition is false. Optional error message shown to the user.

functions.name: $onlyChannels
functions.description: Stops execution unless the command is used in one of the listed channel IDs.

args.name: channelIDs / errorMsg
args.description: Channel IDs to allow, optionally followed by an error message.

functions.name: $onlyUsers
functions.description: Restricts the command to specific user IDs. Stops execution for anyone else.

args.name: userIDs / errorMsg
args.description: User IDs to allow, optionally followed by an error message.

functions.name: $onlyRoles
functions.description: Restricts the command to users who have at least one of the listed roles.

args.name: roleIDs / errorMsg
args.description: Role IDs required, optionally followed by an error message.

functions.name: $onlyPerms
functions.description: Restricts the command to users with specific Discord permissions.

args.name: permissions / errorMsg
args.description: Discord permission names, optionally followed by an error message.

functions.name: $equals
functions.description: Checks strict string equality. Without branches returns 'true'/'false'. With branches, executes matching one lazily.

functions.name: $loop
functions.description: Repeats a block of code N times (max 1000). Body is lazily evaluated each iteration.

functions.name: $loopIndex
functions.description: 0-based iteration index. Only valid inside a $loop body.

functions.name: $loopNumber
functions.description: 1-based iteration number. Only valid inside a $loop body.

functions.name: $stop
functions.description: Immediately halts execution. Code after $stop is not evaluated.

functions.name: $find
functions.description: Search function docs. No query shows full overview. Pass a category name or function name to filter.

functions.name: $and
functions.description: Returns 'true' if ALL provided values are truthy, otherwise 'false'.

functions.name: $or
functions.description: Returns 'true' if ANY provided value is truthy, otherwise 'false'.

functions.name: $not
functions.description: Inverts a boolean. Returns 'true' if the value is falsy, 'false' if truthy.

functions.name: $math
functions.description: Evaluates a math expression safely. Supports: + - * / % ^ () with correct precedence.

functions.name: $random
functions.description: Returns a random integer between min and max (inclusive). One arg = 1–max.

functions.name: $add
functions.description: Returns the sum of all provided numbers.

functions.name: $sub
functions.description: Subtracts b, c, … from a.

args.name: numbers
args.description: First is the base; rest are subtracted from it.

functions.name: $multi
functions.description: Multiplies all provided numbers together.

functions.name: $div
functions.description: Divides a by b.

functions.name: $mod
functions.description: Returns the remainder of a divided by b.

functions.name: $modulo
functions.description: Alias for $mod — returns the remainder of a divided by b.

functions.name: $ceil
functions.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer.

functions.name: $floor
functions.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.

functions.name: $sqrt
functions.description: Returns the square root of a number.

functions.name: $max
functions.description: Returns the largest number from the provided values.

functions.name: $min
functions.description: Returns the smallest number from the provided values.

functions.name: $calculate
functions.description: Alias for $math — evaluates a math expression safely.

functions.name: $sort
functions.description: Sorts a list of numbers (or strings) and returns comma-separated result. Add 'asc' or 'desc' as last arg.

args.name: values / order
args.description: Values to sort. Optional last arg: asc (default) or desc.

functions.name: $upper
functions.description: Converts text to UPPERCASE.

functions.name: $lower
functions.description: Converts text to lowercase.

functions.name: $uppercase
functions.description: Alias for $upper — converts text to UPPERCASE.

functions.name: $lowercase
functions.description: Alias for $lower — converts text to lowercase.

functions.name: $titlecase
functions.description: Capitalises the first letter of each word.

functions.name: $length
functions.description: Returns the number of characters in text.

functions.name: $charCount
functions.description: Alias for $length — returns the number of characters in text.

functions.name: $linesCount
functions.description: Returns the number of newline-separated lines in text.

functions.name: $trim
functions.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace.

functions.name: $trimContent
functions.description: Alias for $trim — removes leading and trailing whitespace.

functions.name: $trimSpace
functions.description: Collapses all internal whitespace runs to a single space, then trims.

functions.name: $replace
functions.description: Replaces all occurrences of a search string with a replacement.

functions.name: $replaceText
functions.description: Alias for $replace — replaces all occurrences of a substring.

functions.name: $includes
functions.description: Returns 'true' if text contains the search string.

functions.name: $slice
functions.description: Extracts a substring by 0-based character index.

args.name: end
args.description: End index (exclusive). Defaults to end of string.

functions.name: $cropText
functions.description: Truncates text to maxLength characters, appending suffix if truncated.

functions.name: $split
functions.description: Splits text by a separator. No index returns the count; an index returns that element (1-based).

args.name: index
args.description: 1-based element to return. No index = total count.

functions.name: $repeat
functions.description: Repeats text N times with an optional separator.

functions.name: $newline
functions.description: Inserts a literal newline character (\n).

functions.name: $space
functions.description: Inserts N space characters (default 1).

functions.name: $numberSeparator
functions.description: Formats a number with thousands separators.

functions.name: $title
functions.description: Sets the embed title. Use with $description, $color, etc. to build an embed.

functions.name: $titleURL
functions.description: Makes the embed title a clickable hyperlink. Requires $title to be set.

functions.name: $description
functions.description: Sets the embed description (main body text).

functions.name: $color
functions.description: Sets the embed accent color using a hex code.

functions.name: $footer
functions.description: Sets the embed footer text.

functions.name: $footerIcon
functions.description: Sets the embed footer icon URL (shown next to footer text).

functions.name: $author
functions.description: Sets the embed author name (shown above the title).

functions.name: $authorIcon
functions.description: Sets the embed author icon URL.

functions.name: $authorURL
functions.description: Makes the embed author name a clickable link.

functions.name: $thumbnail
functions.description: Sets the small image shown at the top-right of the embed.

functions.name: $image
functions.description: Sets the large image shown at the bottom of the embed.

functions.name: $timestamp
functions.description: Adds the current date and time to the embed footer area.

functions.name: $addField
functions.description: Adds a field to the embed. inline=true places fields side-by-side.

functions.name: $sendEmbed
functions.description: Sends the currently built embed to a channel. Returns the sent message ID.

functions.name: $sendEmbedMessage
functions.description: All-in-one embed sender. Pass empty strings to skip optional fields.

args.name: returnID
args.description: Pass 'true' to return the sent message ID.

functions.name: $button
functions.description: Adds a button to the message. style: primary|secondary|success|danger|link

args.name: customID
args.description: Custom ID (or URL for link style).

args.name: emoji
args.description: Emoji to display on the button.

args.name: disabled
args.description: Set to 'true' to disable the button.

functions.name: $selectMenu
functions.description: Adds a select/dropdown menu to the message.

args.name: placeholder
args.description: Placeholder text shown when nothing is selected.

functions.name: $modal
functions.description: Opens a modal dialog. Only works in interaction (slash command / button) contexts.

functions.name: $textInput
functions.description: Adds a text input field to a modal. style: short (default) or paragraph.

functions.name: $time
functions.description: Returns the current Unix timestamp in seconds, or a formatted date string using tokens: YYYY MM DD HH mm ss.

args.name: format
args.description: Format string using tokens. No arg = Unix timestamp.

functions.name: $date
functions.description: Returns the current date as YYYY-MM-DD, or formatted using tokens.

args.name: format
args.description: Format using tokens YYYY MM DD.

functions.name: $day
functions.description: Returns the current day of the month (1–31).

functions.name: $month
functions.description: Returns the current month number (1–12).

functions.name: $year
functions.description: Returns the current 4-digit year.

functions.name: $hour
functions.description: Returns the current hour (0–23).

functions.name: $minute
functions.description: Returns the current minute (0–59).

functions.name: $second
functions.description: Returns the current second (0–59).

functions.name: $cooldown
functions.description: Per-user, per-command cooldown. Stops execution and shows a message if the user is on cooldown.

functions.name: $globalCooldown
functions.description: Server-wide cooldown — all users share one slot per command.

functions.name: $serverCooldown
functions.description: Per-server cooldown — all users in the guild share one slot.

functions.name: $getCooldown
functions.description: Returns the remaining cooldown seconds for the current command.

functions.name: $changeCooldownTime
functions.description: Change or clear the active cooldown time for the current command. Pass '0' to clear.

functions.name: $addReaction
functions.description: Reacts to a message with an emoji. Defaults to the triggering message.

args.name: emoji
args.description: Unicode emoji or custom emoji string.

args.name: messageID
args.description: Target message. Defaults to triggering message.

functions.name: $addReactions
functions.description: Adds multiple reactions to a message at once.

args.name: emojis / messageID
args.description: Emojis to react with. Optional snowflake as last arg = specific message.

functions.name: $addCmdReactions
functions.description: Adds reactions to the triggering command message.

functions.name: $getReactions
functions.description: Returns the count of a specific reaction on a message.

args.name: messageID
args.description: Target message. Defaults to triggering message.

functions.name: $clearReactions
functions.description: Removes ALL reactions from a message. Requires Manage Messages permission.

args.name: messageID
args.description: Target message. Defaults to triggering message.

functions.name: $userReacted
functions.description: Returns 'true' if the specified user reacted with the given emoji.

args.name: userID
args.description: User to check. Defaults to author.

functions.name: $addEmoji
functions.description: Uploads a new custom emoji to the guild. Returns the emoji string. Requires Manage Emojis permission.

args.name: imageURL
args.description: Direct URL to the image (PNG, JPG, GIF).

functions.name: $removeEmoji
functions.description: Deletes a custom emoji from the guild by ID. Requires Manage Emojis permission.

functions.name: $customEmoji
functions.description: Returns the full formatted emoji string for a custom emoji by name.

functions.name: $emojiExists
functions.description: Returns 'true' if a custom emoji with that name exists in the guild.

functions.name: $emojiName
functions.description: Returns the name of a custom emoji by its ID.

functions.name: $emoteCount
functions.description: Returns the number of custom emojis in the guild. Alias for $emojiCount.

functions.name: $isEmojiAnimated
functions.description: Returns 'true' if the custom emoji is animated (GIF), otherwise 'false'.

functions.name: $randomText
functions.description: Returns one of the provided options at random.

functions.name: $choose
functions.description: Alias for $randomText — picks one option at random.

functions.name: $randomString
functions.description: Generates a random string of the given length from the character pool.

functions.name: $randomUser
functions.description: Returns a random guild member's username (non-bots only).

functions.name: $randomUserID
functions.description: Returns a random guild member's user ID (non-bots only).

functions.name: $randomMemberID
functions.description: Returns a random member ID from the cached guild member list.

functions.name: $randomChannelID
functions.description: Returns a random channel ID from the cached guild channel list.

functions.name: $randomRoleID
functions.description: Returns a random role ID from the cached guild role list.

functions.name: $randomGuildID
functions.description: Returns the current guild ID, or a random guild from the bot's cache with arg 'any'.

args.name: any
args.description: Pass 'any' to get a random guild from all guilds the bot is in.

functions.name: $randomMention
functions.description: Mentions a random non-bot guild member.

functions.name: $randomCategoryID
functions.description: Returns the ID of a random category channel in the guild.

functions.name: $eval
functions.description: Re-runs the given string as CenzoJS framework code — NOT JavaScript. Inherits the full execution context (variables, embed state, client, message).

functions.name: $evalDJS
functions.description: Evaluates JavaScript with full discord.js access. DISABLED by default — opt-in via runtime.register('evalDJS', ...). Restrict to bot owners.

args.name: code
args.description: JavaScript code. Has access to: message, client, channel, guild, author.

functions.name: $jsonParse
functions.description: Parses a JSON string. Optionally retrieves a nested value using dot-path notation.

functions.name: $jsonStringify
functions.description: Builds a JSON object from alternating key-value argument pairs.

functions.name: $jsonGet
functions.description: Gets a nested value from a JSON string using dot-path notation.

functions.name: $jsonSet
functions.description: Sets a nested value in a JSON string and returns the updated JSON.

functions.name: $textSplit
functions.description: Splits text by a separator and stores the result for indexed access via $getTextSplitIndex.

functions.name: $getTextSplitIndex
functions.description: Returns the element at the given 1-based index from the last $textSplit result.

functions.name: $while
functions.description: Repeats body while condition is truthy. Max 1000 iterations. Both args are lazy.

functions.name: $forEach
functions.description: Loops over a delimited list executing body for each element. Use $forEachValue, $forEachIndex, $forEachNumber inside.

functions.name: $forEachValue
functions.description: Current element string inside a $forEach body.

functions.name: $forEachIndex
functions.description: 0-based iteration index inside a $forEach body.

functions.name: $forEachNumber
functions.description: 1-based iteration number inside a $forEach body.

functions.name: $break
functions.description: Exits the innermost $while or $forEach loop immediately.

functions.name: $continue
functions.description: Skips the rest of the current loop iteration and moves to the next.

functions.name: $raw
functions.description: Returns the source text of the argument WITHOUT evaluating any $functions. Arg is lazy.

args.name: code
args.description: Framework code to return as literal text.

functions.name: $escape
functions.description: Escapes $ and ; characters so text is safe to pass into $eval.

functions.name: $comment
functions.description: A comment block — always returns empty string. Content is completely ignored.

functions.name: $httpGet
functions.description: Sends an HTTP GET request and returns the response body as a string.

args.name: headers
args.description: Optional JSON object of request headers.

functions.name: $httpPost
functions.description: Sends an HTTP POST request with a body and returns the response.

functions.name: $httpPut
functions.description: Sends an HTTP PUT request with a body and returns the response.

functions.name: $httpDelete
functions.description: Sends an HTTP DELETE request and returns the response body.

functions.name: $createWebhook
functions.description: Creates a webhook in a channel. Returns JSON with id and token fields.

args.name: channelID
args.description: Channel to create the webhook in.

functions.name: $deleteWebhook
functions.description: Deletes a webhook by its ID and token.

functions.name: $webhookSend
functions.description: Sends a message through a webhook with optional custom username and avatar.

functions.name: $createThread
functions.description: Creates a thread from a message or standalone in a text/forum channel. Returns the thread ID.

args.name: messageID
args.description: Message to attach the thread to (optional).

functions.name: $archiveThread
functions.description: Archives a thread channel by ID.

functions.name: $lockThread
functions.description: Locks a thread so only moderators can send messages in it.

functions.name: $hasPerms
functions.description: Returns "true" if the user has ALL listed Discord permissions in the current guild, otherwise "false".

functions.name: $botHasPerms
functions.description: Returns "true" if the bot has ALL listed permissions in the current channel.

functions.name: $try
functions.description: Executes code lazily. If it throws or returns [error:...], executes fallback instead. Both args are lazy.

functions.name: $throw
functions.description: Produces an [error: message] string and stops execution. Intended for use inside $try blocks.

functions.name: $suppressErrors
functions.description: Runs code and silently removes any [error:...] strings from the output. Exceptions are also swallowed.

functions.name: $blacklistUser
functions.description: Adds a user to the persistent guild blacklist.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild scope. Defaults to current guild.

functions.name: $unblacklistUser
functions.description: Removes a user from the guild blacklist.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild scope. Defaults to current guild.

functions.name: $isBlacklisted
functions.description: Returns "true" if the user is blacklisted in this guild, otherwise "false".

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild scope. Defaults to current guild.

functions.name: $mute
functions.description: Applies a Discord timeout (mute) to a member for a specified duration in milliseconds.

functions.name: $warn
functions.description: Adds a persistent warning to a user and returns their new total warning count.

args.name: guildID
args.description: Guild scope. Defaults to current guild.

functions.name: $uptime
functions.description: Returns the bot's uptime. format: human (default) | seconds | ms.

functions.name: $linkButton
functions.description: Adds a link-style button that opens a URL when clicked. Does not fire interaction events.

functions.name: $actionRow
functions.description: Force-closes the current action row and starts a new one. Discord allows up to 5 rows per message.

functions.name: $pinMessage
functions.description: Pins a message. Defaults to the current message if messageID is omitted.

args.name: messageID
args.description: Message to pin. Defaults to current message.

functions.name: $unpinMessage
functions.description: Unpins a message by ID.

functions.name: $crosspost
functions.description: Publishes (crossposts) a message in an Announcement channel to all following channels.

args.name: messageID
args.description: Message to crosspost. Defaults to current message.

functions.name: $messageURL
functions.description: Returns the direct Discord jump URL of a message. Defaults to the current message.

functions.name: $isBanned
functions.description: Returns "true" if the user is currently banned from the guild.

functions.name: $unban
functions.description: Removes a ban so the user can rejoin the server.

functions.name: $setNick
functions.description: Sets or resets a member's server nickname. Pass empty string to clear it.

args.name: nickname
args.description: New nickname. Empty string to clear.

functions.name: $setRoleColor
functions.description: Sets a role's color. Accepts hex (#FF0000), decimal integer, or color name.

functions.name: $setRoleName
functions.description: Renames a role.

functions.name: $setRoleHoist
functions.description: Sets whether a role is displayed separately in the member list.

functions.name: $setRoleMentionable
functions.description: Sets whether regular users can @mention the role.

functions.name: $setChannelTopic
functions.description: Sets the topic of a text channel. Pass empty string to clear it.

args.name: topic
args.description: New topic text. Empty string clears it.

functions.name: $setChannelNSFW
functions.description: Marks or unmarks a channel as age-restricted (NSFW).

functions.name: $discordTimestamp
functions.description: Returns a Discord dynamic timestamp tag <t:UNIX:FORMAT>. Defaults to now.

args.name: unixMs
args.description: Unix timestamp in ms. Defaults to now.

functions.name: $snowflakeTime
functions.description: Converts a Discord snowflake ID to a timestamp. format: discord (default)|ms|s.

functions.name: $stageStart
functions.description: Starts a stage instance in a Stage channel. Returns the stage instance ID.

functions.name: $stageEnd
functions.description: Ends the active stage instance in a Stage channel.

functions.name: $vcUserCount
functions.description: Returns the number of members currently in a voice channel. Defaults to author's VC.

args.name: channelID
args.description: Voice channel ID. Defaults to author's current VC.

functions.name: $vcUsers
functions.description: Returns a separated list of user IDs currently in a voice channel.

functions.name: $vcName
functions.description: Returns the name of a voice channel.

functions.name: $vcBitrate
functions.description: Returns the bitrate (kbps) of a voice channel.

functions.name: $vcUserLimit
functions.description: Returns the user limit of a VC. 0 = unlimited.

functions.name: $vcRegion
functions.description: Returns the RTC region of a voice channel.

functions.name: $vcMuteUser
functions.description: Server-mutes a member in their current voice channel.

functions.name: $vcUnmuteUser
functions.description: Removes server-mute from a member.

functions.name: $vcDeafenUser
functions.description: Server-deafens a member in their voice channel.

functions.name: $vcUndeafenUser
functions.description: Removes server-deafen from a member.

functions.name: $vcKickUser
functions.description: Disconnects a member from their current voice channel.

functions.name: $vcMoveUser
functions.description: Moves a member to a different voice channel.

functions.name: $isInVC
functions.description: Returns "true" if the user is currently in any voice channel.

functions.name: $userVC
functions.description: Returns the ID of the voice channel the user is currently in.

functions.name: $userVCName
functions.description: Returns the name of the voice channel the user is currently in.

functions.name: $giveawayCreate
functions.description: Creates a giveaway embed with 🎉 reaction entry. Returns the message ID (giveaway ID).

functions.name: $giveawayEnd
functions.description: Ends a giveaway, picks winners from 🎉 reactors, announces them. Returns winner mentions.

functions.name: $giveawayReroll
functions.description: Re-picks winners from existing reactions, skipping previous winners.

functions.name: $giveawayList
functions.description: Returns a list of active giveaway message IDs for this guild.

functions.name: $giveawayInfo
functions.description: Returns a specific field from a giveaway's stored data.

functions.name: $giveawayWinners
functions.description: Returns a separated list of winner user IDs from a concluded giveaway.

functions.name: $createInvite
functions.description: Creates an invite link. maxAge in seconds (0=permanent). Returns the full URL.

args.name: channelID
args.description: Channel to invite to. Defaults to current.

args.name: temporary
args.description: Kick on disconnect if no role.

functions.name: $deleteInvite
functions.description: Deletes an invite by its code.

functions.name: $inviteUses
functions.description: Returns the number of times an invite code has been used.

functions.name: $serverInvites
functions.description: Returns a separated list of all active invite codes for the current server.

functions.name: $createEvent
functions.description: Creates a Discord scheduled event. Pass a channelID for VOICE type, omit for EXTERNAL. Returns event ID.

functions.name: $deleteEvent
functions.description: Cancels and deletes a scheduled guild event by ID.

functions.name: $listEvents
functions.description: Returns a list of upcoming scheduled events. format: id|name|both.

functions.name: $eventUserCount
functions.description: Returns the number of users subscribed to a scheduled event.

functions.name: $json
functions.description: Read a value from the active JSON context (loaded by $jsonParse). Supports nested key navigation.

args.name: key
args.description: Key path, one arg per level.

functions.name: $jsonUnset
functions.description: Delete a key (or nested key path) from the active JSON context.

functions.name: $jsonExists
functions.description: Returns "true" if a key path exists in the active JSON context, "false" otherwise.

functions.name: $jsonArray
functions.description: Get an element by 0-based index from an array at a key path in the JSON context.

functions.name: $jsonArrayAppend
functions.description: Append a value to an array at a key path in the JSON context.

functions.name: $jsonArrayPop
functions.description: Remove and return the last element of an array at a key path in the JSON context.

functions.name: $jsonArrayShift
functions.description: Remove and return the first element of an array at a key path in the JSON context.

functions.name: $jsonArrayCount
functions.description: Return the length of an array at a key path in the JSON context.

functions.name: $jsonPretty
functions.description: Return a pretty-printed string of the current JSON context.

args.name: indent
args.description: Spaces per indent level. Default: 2. Use 0 for compact.

functions.name: $jsonClear
functions.description: Clear the active JSON context (removes the stored parsed object).

functions.name: $jsonSetString
functions.description: Set a key in the JSON context, always storing the value as a string (no type coercion).

functions.name: $httpPatch
functions.description: Send an HTTP PATCH request and return the response body. Also stores status in $httpStatus.

args.name: headers
args.description: JSON string of header key-value pairs.

functions.name: $httpResult
functions.description: Return the stored HTTP response from the last request. With key args, parses as JSON and navigates.

functions.name: $httpStatus
functions.description: Return the HTTP status code from the last request (e.g. "200", "404").

functions.name: $httpAddHeader
functions.description: Add a persistent header included in all subsequent HTTP requests in this script.

functions.name: $httpRemoveHeader
functions.description: Remove a previously added persistent HTTP header.

functions.name: $nickname
functions.description: Returns the server nickname of a member, or their username if no nickname is set.

functions.name: $userBannerColor
functions.description: Returns the user's banner color as a hex string (e.g. "#ff0000"). Empty if none.

functions.name: $userServerAvatar
functions.description: Returns the per-server avatar URL of a member. Falls back to their global avatar.

functions.name: $userExists
functions.description: Returns "true" if the user ID resolves to a valid Discord user, "false" otherwise.

functions.name: $isAdmin
functions.description: Returns "true" if the member has the Administrator permission.

functions.name: $isTimedOut
functions.description: Returns "true" if the member is currently timed out (communication disabled).

functions.name: $isBooster
functions.description: Returns "true" if the member is currently boosting the server.

functions.name: $userPerms
functions.description: Returns the permission names of a member as a separated list.

functions.name: $modifyRole
functions.description: Edit multiple role properties (name, color, hoist, mentionable) in one call.

functions.name: $setUserRoles
functions.description: Replace all of a member's roles with the provided list of role IDs.

args.name: reason
args.description: Audit log reason (last arg if non-snowflake).

functions.name: $roleID
functions.description: Returns the ID of the first role whose name matches (case-insensitive).

functions.name: $roleName
functions.description: Returns the name of a role by its ID.

functions.name: $rolePosition
functions.description: Returns the integer hierarchy position of a role.

functions.name: $getRoleColor
functions.description: Returns the hex color of a role (e.g. "#ff0000"). Returns "#000000" if no color.

functions.name: $modifyChannel
functions.description: Edit multiple channel properties (name, topic, nsfw, slowmode, category) in one call.

functions.name: $channelType
functions.description: Returns the type of a channel as a string: text, voice, category, announcement, thread, stage, forum.

functions.name: $channelExists
functions.description: Returns "true" if the channel ID exists and the bot can access it.

functions.name: $parentID
functions.description: Returns the category (parent) ID of a channel. Empty if no parent.

functions.name: $editThread
functions.description: Edit multiple thread properties (name, archived, archive duration, locked, slowmode) in one call.

functions.name: $threadAddMember
functions.description: Add a member to a thread so they can view and post in it.

functions.name: $threadRemoveMember
functions.description: Remove a member from a thread.

functions.name: $editMessage
functions.description: Edit an existing message. Supports plain content and an optional embed.

functions.name: $replyIn
functions.description: Schedule the reply to be sent after a delay by setting __reply_delay__ (your reply handler acts on it).

functions.name: $deleteIn
functions.description: Schedule the bot's reply to be deleted after a delay (sets __delete_after__ flag).

functions.name: $editIn
functions.description: Schedule the bot's reply to be edited with new content after a delay (sets __edit_after__ flag).

functions.name: $repeatMessage
functions.description: Send a message to the current channel multiple times (max 10).

functions.name: $byteCount
functions.description: Returns the UTF-8 byte length of the provided text.

functions.name: $joinSplitText
functions.description: Join the current text-split array (from $textSplit) back into a single string.

functions.name: $executionTime
functions.description: Returns the script execution time in milliseconds since context creation.

functions.name: $botTyping
functions.description: Trigger the 'Bot is typing...' indicator in a channel.

functions.name: $tts
functions.description: Mark the response as TTS. Your reply handler should pass { tts: true } when this flag is set.

functions.name: $nomention
functions.description: Disable all @mentions in the reply. Your handler should pass allowedMentions: { parse: [] }.

functions.name: $ephemeral
functions.description: Mark the response as ephemeral (only visible to the command user). Slash commands only.

functions.name: $defer
functions.description: Defer the interaction ('Bot is thinking...'). Your handler should call interaction.deferReply().

functions.name: $ai
functions.description: One-shot OpenAI chat completion using gpt-4o-mini. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

examples.output: Why did the chicken cross the road?

functions.name: $aiWithCtx
functions.description: Stateful AI chat that maintains conversation history across calls within the same script run.

functions.name: $aiAgent
functions.description: AI agent using gpt-4o for complex reasoning tasks requiring step-by-step thinking.

functions.name: $aiDecide
functions.description: AI yes/no classifier — returns "true" or "false" based on whether content matches a question.

functions.name: $aiDecideWithCtx
functions.description: Like $aiDecide but uses the $aiWithCtx conversation history as the content context.

functions.name: $aiQuota
functions.description: Returns the total number of OpenAI tokens used by AI functions in this script run.

functions.name: $registerGuildCommands
functions.description: Register slash commands in a guild. Args come in name/description pairs. Returns the count registered.

functions.name: $unregisterGuildCommands
functions.description: Remove ALL slash commands from a guild. Returns the number of commands cleared.

functions.name: $slashID
functions.description: Returns the ID of a registered slash command by name.

functions.name: $slashCommandsCount
functions.description: Returns the count of registered slash commands (guild or global).

functions.name: $newTicket
functions.description: Create a support ticket channel under a category. Returns channel ID if returnID=true.

args.name: returnID
args.description: Set true to return the channel ID.

examples.code: $newTicket[Support;Please ask a question;Welcome! Staff will assist you.;Check your DM!;Error;]true]

functions.name: $closeTicket
functions.description: Close (delete) the current ticket channel. Must be called inside a ticket channel.

args.name: errorMessage
args.description: Returned if not in a ticket channel.

functions.name: $isTicket
functions.description: Returns "true" if the channel is an active ticket channel, "false" otherwise.

functions.name: $async
functions.description: Mark the start of a named async block definition. Block ends at $endasync.

functions.name: $endasync
functions.description: Mark the end of an async block definition (used with $async[name]).

functions.name: $await
functions.description: Execute a named async block previously stored with $async/$endasync.

functions.name: $addButtonCV2
functions.description: Add a button with an explicit action row ID (components v2 system).

args.name: buttonID
args.description: Custom ID or URL for link buttons.

functions.name: $editButton
functions.description: Edit an existing button on a message by its custom ID or URL.

args.name: buttonID
args.description: Custom ID or URL to match.

functions.name: $removeButtons
functions.description: Remove all button components from a message.

functions.name: $addStringSelect
functions.description: Create a string/text dropdown select menu. Use $addStringSelectOption to add choices.

functions.name: $addStringSelectOption
functions.description: Add an option to the most recently created (or specified) string select menu.

functions.name: $addUserSelect
functions.description: Create a user picker select menu component.

functions.name: $addRoleSelect
functions.description: Create a role picker select menu component.

functions.name: $addMentionableSelect
functions.description: Create a mentionable (user + role) select menu component.

functions.name: $addChannelSelect
functions.description: Create a channel picker select menu. Optionally filter by channel type.
